violations.text: The presence of (rodent activity) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings) located in several areas of the kitchen: -dry storage area located on shelving, floors and the top of some food containers (sunflower seed butter) -underneath 3-bay sink -underneath dishwasher -between hot hold/stove units on floor The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Staff voluntarily disposed of sunflower seed butter containers. Establishment must provide latest PCS report to inspector before re-inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
The following non-food contact surface of prep sink was observed with accumulation of biofilm hanging from drain and building up in the outlet part of airgap. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
The wall tiles in the hand sink area and back of kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/23/2026
The following non-food contact surface of prep sink was observed with accumulation of biofilm hanging from drain and building up in the outlet part of airgap. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC washed, rinsed, and sanitized slicer. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

The double doors to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces: 1. Condenser unit in walk-in cooler observed with debris on each side of it. PIC will put in a work order for service. 3.Observed prep sink with accumulation of biofilm hanging from drain and building up in the outlet part of airgap. PIC will put in work order to get airgap cleaned/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

A paper towel dispenser was observed above the pre-rinse sink in the ware-washing area. A sink used for FOOD preparation or UTENSIL washing, or a service sink or curbed cleaning facility used for the disposal of mop water or similar wastes, may not be provided with the handwashing aids and devices required for a HANDWASHING SINK. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the deli slicer have an accumulation of food residue. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

An employee was observed washing their hands at the pre wash sink in the ware-washing area. Food employees shall clean their hands in a designated hand-washing sink and not in a food preparation, mop, or ware-washing sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

Paper towel dispensers were observed at the three bay sink and pre wash sink. A sink used for FOOD preparation or UTENSIL washing, or a service sink or curbed cleaning facility used for the disposal of mop water or similar wastes, may not be provided with the handwashing aids and devices required for a HAND WASHING SINK. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
The ceiling in the walk-in freezer has an accumulation of ice. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024
The walk-in freezer door gaskets were observed in poor repair. (Ice accumulation was observed in the freezer) New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2023
